## Testing

## Visual Parity

Complete this section if the PR changes user-visible Android UI.

- [ ] No user-visible Android UI changed
- [ ] I compared the touched states against the Remodex reference package
- [ ] I added Android screenshots or recordings for each touched state, or I documented the missing capture as explicit backlog
- [ ] I updated parity docs if the status, evidence, or allowed-compromise mapping changed
- [ ] I reused shared Remodex primitives and tokens instead of introducing raw Material-default UI

- `Docs/remodex-visual-reference/README.md`
- `Docs/remodex-visual-reference/parity-board.md`
